title: Tra-Vel private quote-case acquisition attribution
description: The closed, bounded marketing-attribution record stored with an assisted quote case. It is operator-readable only: it never appears in traveler-visible payloads, event payloads, or logs, and only utm_source, utm_medium, and utm_campaign may leave through the operator notification email and webhook. Every field is optional; an object with no surviving fields is not stored at all.
